description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Fedora Docker image `registry.hub.docker.com/library/fedora:$VER` with a default variable `VER` set to 29, defines the stages `build` and `deploy`, and runs a job named `build:x86_64` in the `build` stage. The job should run only on the `master` branch, upload all repository files as artifacts when the job fails, and execute the following shell commands in order: `rpm --import /etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-*`, `dnf install openssl openssh-clients git pykickstart livecd-tools mock rsync file tar tree -y`, `openssl enc -aes-256-cbc -d -in .stuff-gitlab.tar.gz.enc -out stuff.tar.gz -k $DE_PASS`, `tar xzvf stuff.tar.gz -C /tmp/`, `eval "$(ssh-agent -s)"`, `chmod 600 /tmp/stuff/.deploy`, `ssh-add /tmp/stuff/.deploy`, `mkdir -p ~/.ssh`, `mv /tmp/stuff/.host ~/.ssh/config`, `chmod 600 ~/.ssh/config`, `chown root ~/.ssh/config`, `export DE=$(echo ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}|cut -d- -f1)`, conditional defaults for `DE` to `xfce` and `VER` to `29`, `git clone https://gitlab.com/korora/kp.git`, `cd ./kp`, `cp kp.conf.example kp.conf`, `./kp init`, `dnf update -y`, `/usr/bin/livecd-creator --help`, `echo $?`, `./kp release --release-version ${VER} --desktop ${DE} korora-${DE}`, set `TASK_NAME="korora-live-${DE}-${VER}-x86_64"`, create the task directory, timestamp the ISO, move the generated ISO into the task folder with a timestamped name, compute its MD5 checksum, and finally sync the folder to `foobar2:public_html/pub/korora/iso/testing/${VER}/` via rsync over SSH. Tag the runner with `ostack`.
